3 #define DIVKGRADTWOPOINTSSERVICE_H
4 
5 #include <arcane/SharedVariable.h>
6 #include <boost/shared_ptr.hpp>
7 
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometryMng.h"
9 
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/DiscreteOperatorProperty.h"
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/IDivKGradDiscreteOperator.h"
12 
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/DiscreteOperator/TensorAlgebra.h"
14 
15 #include "DivKGradTwoPoints_axl.h"
16 
17 using namespace Arcane;
18 
25 class DivKGradTwoPointsService :
26  public IDivKGradDiscreteOperator,
27  public ArcaneDivKGradTwoPointsObject {
28 public:
30  DivKGradTwoPointsService(const ServiceBuildInfo& sbi) :
31  ArcaneDivKGradTwoPointsObject(sbi),
32  m_status(DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_NONE),
33  m_geometry_service(NULL),
34  m_options(DiscreteOperatorProperty::O_NONE),
35  m_properties(DiscreteOperatorProperty::P_NONE)
36  {
37  //
38  }
39 
41  virtual ~DivKGradTwoPointsService()
42  {
43  // Delete m_face group
44  }
45 
47  virtual VersionInfo versionInfo() const
48  {
49  return VersionInfo(1, 0, 0);
50  }
51 
52 public:
54  void init();
55 
56  void prepare(IMesh * mesh,
57  CoefficientArrayT<Cell> * cell_coefficients,
58  CoefficientArrayT<Face> * face_coefficients);
59 
61  ARCANE_DEPRECATED void prepare(const FaceGroup& internal_faces,
62  const FaceGroup& boundary_faces,
63  FaceGroup& c_internal_faces,
64  FaceGroup& cf_internal_faces,
65  CoefficientArrayT<Cell>* cell_coefficients,
66  CoefficientArrayT<Face>* face_coefficients);
67 
69  void finalize();
70 
72  inline Integer getCellGeometricProperties() {
73  return IGeometryProperty::PCenter;
74  }
76  inline Integer getFaceGeometricProperties() {
77  return (IGeometryProperty::PCenter | IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
78  }
79 
80  // Variables
82  void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal& k);
84  void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal3& k);
86  void formDiscreteOperator(const VariableCellReal3x3& k);
87 
88  // Shared variables
90  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal& k);
92  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal3& k);
94  virtual void formDiscreteOperator(const SharedVariableCellReal3x3& k);
95 
96  inline bool twoPointBoundary()
97  {
98  return true;
99  }
100 
101 public:
103  inline const FaceGroup& faces() const
104  {
105  return m_faces;
106  }
108  inline const CellGroup& cells() const
109  {
110  return m_cells;
111  }
113  inline const FaceGroup& boundaryFaces() const
114  {
115  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
116  ("Boundary face group has not been computed/defined") );
117  return m_boundary_faces;
118  }
120  inline const FaceGroup& internalFaces() const
121  {
122  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
123  ("Internal face group has not been computed/defined") );
124  return m_internal_faces;
125  }
127  inline const FaceGroup& cInternalFaces() const
128  {
129  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
130  ("CInternal face group has not been computed/defined") );
131  return m_c_internal_faces;
132  }
134  inline const FaceGroup& cfInternalFaces() const
135  {
136  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
137  ("CFInternal face group has not been computed/defined") );
138  return m_cf_internal_faces;
139  }
141  const Integer & status() const
142  {
143  return m_status;
144  }
145 
146 private:
147  Integer m_status;
148 
149  // Geometry service
150  IGeometryMng* m_geometry_service;
151 
152  // Status flags
153  Integer m_options;
154  Integer m_properties;
155 
156  // Prepared flag
157  bool m_prepared;
158 
159  // Faces group
160  FaceGroup m_faces;
161  // Cells group
162  CellGroup m_cells;
163  // Faces whose flux stencil contains cell unknowns only
164  FaceGroup m_internal_faces;
165  // Boundary faces group
166  FaceGroup m_boundary_faces;
167  // Internal faces whose stencil contains cell unknowns only
168  FaceGroup m_c_internal_faces;
169  // Internal faces whose stencil contains both cells and face unknowns
170  FaceGroup m_cf_internal_faces;
171 
172  // Cell group name
173  String m_cells_group_name;
174  // Face group name
175  String m_faces_group_name;
176 
177  // Cell coefficients
178  CoefficientArrayT<Cell>* m_cell_coefficients;
179  // Face coefficients
180  CoefficientArrayT<Face>* m_face_coefficients;
181 
182  // Object ownership, for backward compatibility only
183  boost::shared_ptr<CoefficientArrayT<Cell> > m_cell_ownership;
184  boost::shared_ptr<CoefficientArrayT<Face> > m_face_ownership;
185 
186  template<typename VariableTypeT>
187  void _form_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & k);
188 };
189 
190 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
191 
192 template<typename VariableTypeT>
193 void DivKGradTwoPointsService::_form_discrete_operator(const VariableTypeT & k)
194 {
195  ARCANE_ASSERT( (m_status & DiscreteOperatorProperty::S_PREPARED),
196  ("Operator not prepared") );
197 
198  typedef typename VariableTraitsT<VariableTypeT>::DataType DiffusionType;
199 
200  // Retrieve geometrical properties
201  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& f_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
202  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& f_normals = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(m_faces, IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
203 
204  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& c_centers = m_geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(m_cells, IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
205 
206  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_internal_faces) {
207  const Face& F = *iF;
208 
209  // Retrieve information
210  const Cell& T0 = F.backCell();
211  const Cell& T1 = F.frontCell();
212 
213  const Real3& nF = f_normals[F];
214 
215  const Real3& C0 = c_centers[T0];
216  const Real3& C1 = c_centers[T1];
217  const Real3& CF = f_centers[F];
218 
219  Real3 s0F = CF - C0;
220  Real3 s1F = CF - C1;
221  Real3 s01 = C1 - C0;
222 
223  Real d0F = math::abs(math::scaMul(s0F, nF));
224  Real d1F = math::abs(math::scaMul(s1F, nF));
225  Real d01 = math::scaMul(s01, s01);
226 
227  const DiffusionType & k0 = k[T0];
228  const DiffusionType & k1 = k[T1];
229 
230  Real t0 = math::scaMul(nF, DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(k0, nF)) / d0F;
231  Real t1 = math::scaMul(nF, DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(k1, nF)) / d1F;
232 
233  // Compute transmissivities
234  Real nFnF = math::scaMul(nF, nF);
235  Real cos2 = (d0F+d1F)*(d0F+d1F)/ (d01 * nFnF);
236  Real tau = math::abs(t0 + t1) ? (t0 * t1 / (t0 + t1)) * cos2 : 0;
237 
238  StencilFluxCoeffType tau_F = m_cell_coefficients->coefficients(F);
239  tau_F[0] = tau;
240  tau_F[1] = -tau;
241  }
242 
243  // Boundary faces
244  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_boundary_faces) {
245 
246  const Face& F = *iF;
247 
248  Real tau = 0;
249 
250  if(F.isOwn()) {
251 
252  // Retrieve information
253  const Cell& T0 = F.boundaryCell();
254 
255  const Real3& nF = f_normals[F];
256 
257  const Real3& C0 = c_centers[T0];
258  const Real3& CF = f_centers[F];
259  const Real3 s0F = CF - C0;
260 
261  Real d0F1 = math::scaMul(s0F, s0F);
262  Real d0F2 = math::abs(math::scaMul(s0F, nF));
263 
264  const DiffusionType & k0 = k[T0];
265 
266  // Compute transmissivities
267  Real nFnF = math::scaMul(nF, nF);
268  Real cos2 = (d0F2 * d0F2) / (d0F1 * nFnF) ;
269  tau = math::scaMul(nF, DiscreteOperator::tensor_vector_prod<DiffusionType>::eval(k0, nF)) / d0F2;
270  tau = tau * cos2;
271  }
272  else {
273  tau=0.;
274  }
275 
276  StencilFluxCoeffType c_tau_F = m_cell_coefficients->coefficients(F);
277  StencilFluxCoeffType f_tau_F = m_face_coefficients->coefficients(F);
278 
279  c_tau_F[0] = tau;
280  f_tau_F[0] = -tau;
281  }
282 }
283 
284 #endif
